introSection: Fast & Furious: Hollywood Drift is an Intamin steel launched spinning roller coaster currently under construction at Universal Studios Hollywood in Universal City, California, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The first ride vehicle was unveiled on June 12, 2025.

One of the ride's cars was showcased at Intamin's booth at the 2025 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

By November 20, 2025, the ride had began testing with its cars rotating.

fullText:
Fast & Furious: Hollywood Drift is an Intamin steel launched spinning roller coaster currently under construction at Universal Studios Hollywood in Universal City, California, USA.

The first ride vehicle was unveiled on June 12, 2025.

One of the ride's cars was showcased at Intamin's booth at the 2025 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

By November 20, 2025, the ride had began testing with its cars rotating.
